understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to position selectable pieces (P/S) onto goal markers (+) by moving them and potentially pushing blocks (B), all within a limited number of steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_*) shift the currently selected piece (P) in the specified direction by 3 pixels (one cell), potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects like blocks if unobstructed; walls (#) and boundaries block movement; CLICK switches control to another selectable (S) at the exact target_position coordinates without moving pieces, just changing selection.
